title: clitoria epetiolata var. angustissima
intro: Clitoria epetiolata var. angustissima, also known as the slender butterfly pea, is a variant of the Clitoria ternatea plant, a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. The slender butterfly pea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Clitoria epetiolata var. angustissima include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a healthy sleep-wake cycle, as well as its ability to act as an adaptogen to help the body adapt to physical and mental stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or supplement, or used as an ingredient in traditional medicine, making it a valuable addition to natural health and wellness regimens.
